examples.en: Hello everyone, let's start the class.
Good morning! It is a beautiful day.
Listen carefully, then please repeat after me.
examples.ar: استمع جيداً، ثم من فضلك ردد خلفي.

examples.en: I will read the verse, then please repeat after me.
examples.ar: سأقرأ الآية، ثم من فضلك ردد خلفي.

examples.en: Excellent! One more time, please repeat after me.
examples.ar: ممتاز! مرة أخرى، من فضلك ردد خلفي.

examples.en: Let's start. Open your Mushaf to page 20.
examples.ar: دعنا نبدأ. افتح المصحف على صفحة 20.

examples.en: You need to stretch this letter for two counts.
examples.ar: تحتاج إلى مد هذا الحرف بمقدار حركتين.

examples.en: Make sure to pronounce the Ghunnah from the nose.
examples.ar: تأكد من نطق الغنة من الخيشوم.
سبح عبر النهر / قطع النهر سباحة.

examples.en: I see him as a friend.
The beach is two miles away.
His house is far away from the city center.
He was lying on his back.
He went to bed early tonight.
examples.ar: لقد ذهب إلى الفراش مبكرًا الليلة.

examples.en: Believe me it's going to be okay.
examples.ar: صدقني سيكون كل شيء على ما يرام.

examples.en: The book is below the table.
The boy breaks his pencil every time.
examples.ar: الولد يكسر قلمه الرصاص كل مرة.

examples.en: I don't usually eat breakfast before work.
examples.ar: لا أتناول عادة الفطور قبل العمل.

examples.en: She prepares a healthy breakfast every day.
examples.ar: إنها تعد فطورًا صحيًا كل يوم.

examples.en: The restaurant is by the beach.
I got a call from work.
What is the capital of Germany?
Muscat is the capital of Oman.
Write your name on this card.

examples.ar: لقد أضاعت بطاقة المكتبة الخاصة بها.

examples.en: We are living in the 21st century.
examples.ar: نحن نعيش في القرن الحادي والعشرين.

examples.en: I need to change my clothes.
We have six classes every day.
examples.ar: لدينا ست حصص دراسية كل يوم.

examples.en: The cost of living is high.
I could swim as a child.
I cut the apple in half.
She loves to dance at parties.
examples.ar: هي تحب أن ترقص في الحفلات.

examples.en: I like the design of this building.
I will do my homework later.
examples.ar: سوف أقوم بواجبي المنزلي في وقت لاحق.

examples.en: He will move to the east.
I didn't like the end of the movie.
We have enough food for everyone.
Exercise is good for your health.
Open your eyes and look around.
He has a small, happy family.
He drives a fast sports car.
This is my first time here.
examples.ar: هذه هي المرة الأولى لي هنا.

examples.en: Running is a form of exercise.
examples.ar: الجري هو شكل من أشكال التمارين الرياضية.

examples.en: She went to get her coat.
Her hair will grow longer soon.
Can you guess where I am?
examples.ar: هل يمكنك أن تخمن أين أنا؟

examples.en: The gym is open all day.
They have a lot of fun.
examples.ar: إنهم يحظون بالكثير من المرح معاً.
هل يمكنك أن تساعدني من فضلك؟

examples.en: I need more ice in my juice.
examples.ar: أحتاج إلى المزيد من الثلج في عصيري.

examples.en: If you need help ask me.
examples.ar: إن كنت بحاجة إلى مساعدة فاطلبها مني.

examples.en: The keys are in my bag.
The train will arrive in ten minutes.
You look amazing in that dress.
The idea interested him a lot.
He prepared well for the interview.
I bought it as a birthday present.
The cat didn't eat its food.

examples.ar: حصل منشوري على العديد من الإعجابات.

examples.en: My wife gave me a present.
June is the start of summer.
I always keep food in my bag.
Keep these school books for next year.
examples.ar: أبقِ هذه الكتب المدرسية للعام القادم.

examples.en: They had key information for us.
Let me explain the key point again.
examples.ar: دعني أشرح النقطة الأساسية مرة أخرى.

examples.en: Those are the key players on the team.
examples.ar: هؤلاء هم اللاعبون الرئيسيون في الفريق.

examples.en: This is the last day of school.
examples.ar: هذا هو آخر يوم في المدرسة.

examples.en: I will tell you, but don't laugh.
He was sitting on my left.
They learned the first five letters today.
examples.ar: لقد تعلموا اليوم أول خمسة أحرف.

examples.en: The light is low in this room.
I forgot to turn off the lights.
Draw a line on the paper.
Is my name on this list?
He has a lot of friends.
This book tells a beautiful love story.
examples.ar: يروي هذا الكتاب قصة حب جميلة.

examples.en: Lunch is ready; come and eat.
Please make me a cup of tea.
examples.ar: من فضلك أعد لي كوباً من الشاي.

examples.en: She knows more than you think.
I forgot my keys at home.

examples.ar: ما الذي يجب أن نفعله بعد ذلك؟

examples.en: Meet me at the north door.
He wants to be a nurse.
The object is on the table.
The color of the car is red.

examples.ar: كل شيء على ما يرام الآن.

examples.en: We are going on a trip.
One of them brought a camera.
He is the one who helped.
I only want to help you.
He ordered a taxi for us.
The plane flew over the city.
I bought a pair of shoes.

examples.ar: يحتوي هذا المتنزه على العديد من الأشجار.

examples.en: I was sick the past few days.
examples.ar: كنت مريضاً في الأيام القليلة الماضية.

examples.en: I forgot my phone at home.
My plan is to leave soon.
She loves to play with her cat.

examples.ar: هل يمكنك أن تعزف على الجيتار؟
كان الاختبار سهلاً إلى حد ما.
إنه ممثل جيد إلى حد ما.

examples.en: That name is quite common in our country.
examples.ar: هذا الاسم شائع إلى حد ما في بلدنا.

examples.en: Park your car on the right.
We met at the same place.
I feel the same as you.
We closed the shop early today.
I am watching a cooking show.
I grew up in a small village.
I like to walk in the snow.
I was tired, so I slept.
The nearest star is the sun.
The telephone is on the table.
I hope that you feel better.
I like these types of games.
Let's wait until the rain stops.
Keep reading until you understand everything.
examples.ar: استمر في القراءة حتى تفهم كل شيء.

examples.en: I visited my aunt last week.
I start work at eight AM.
